name: Olde Soul Barbershop
notes: Multi-location barbershop chain with classic branding, booking app available. Website features prominent location pages with beard care services and grooming imagery.

name: Uptown & Humboldt
notes: Food hall restaurant inside Zeppelin Station at 3501 Wazee St. Website shows food truck menu, blog section, and detailed owner bio with Puerto Rican and Spanish heritage mention.

name: Portland Dental PC
notes: General dentistry practice at 511 SW 10th Ave. Website lists services, hours (Mon-Thu 7AM-4PM), and doctor profiles with advanced dental techniques messaging.

name: Deep Roots ATX Salon
notes: Multi-location Austin salon with dedicated contact emails for each location (Austin, Cedar Park, Bridal services). Website features salon gallery, services page, and Terms & Conditions page.

name: Infinite Vitality Chiropractic & Massage
notes: Chiropractic clinic at 13150 NE Halsey St. Website features services section, contact form, and business hours clearly displayed (Mon-Thu 9am-6pm, Fri 9am-5pm).

name: Johnson's Auto Repair
notes: Family-owned since 1949, relocated to 9418 35th Ave NE. Website shows established reputation, hours (Mon-Fri 7:30am-5:30pm), and family business heritage messaging.

name: Mose Auto
notes: Community-focused auto repair at 700 S Orchard St. Website emphasizes women empowerment in automotive field, offers basic maintenance classes, hours Mon-Fri 9am-6pm.

name: Bert Roofing, Inc.
notes: Family-owned roofing company at 10021 Cayuga Dr since 1988. Website includes 'Our Story' page with company history, management team page, and BBB Business Profile link.

name: T Rock Roofing & Contracting
notes: Operating 65+ years at 9330 LBJ Fwy. Website features team bios, FAQ section, contact form, and service area information for Dallas area.

name: Corcoran Perry & Co.
notes: Locally-owned brokerage since 1971 with 4 Denver-area office locations. Website lists multiple offices, agent listings, and luxury property focus with navigation to office locations page.

name: Brody Pennell Heating & Air Conditioning
notes: Operating since 1945 at 8599 Venice Blvd. Website includes 'About Us' section with technician bios, cities served page, 461+ Yelp reviews, and contact form with 24-hour response time.

name: Law Office of Matthew J. Kidd
notes: Solo practice at 12 Ericsson St, Ste 201. Website features practice areas (criminal defense, personal injury), Super Lawyers profile, resources/videos page, and about section.

name: Effortless Movement Pilates Studio
notes: Independent pilates studio at 1730 SW Skyline Blvd Suite 222. Contact form and direct email available on site, along with instructor information.
